# DriftDetected

> Fired when prompt or output drift is detected

**Channel:** webhook

## Payload

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| driftDetectionId | string | yes | - |
| driftType | string | yes | - |
| severity | string | yes | - |
| score | number | yes | - |
| organizationId | string | yes | - |

- Trigger: `manual`

## Subscriber

- **Handler:** `dispatchAlert`
- **Retry:** max 3 attempts (exponential)
